shadowSentences: The sun is shining brightly today.
I enjoy reading books in my free time.
Cooking new recipes is a fun hobby.
My favorite season is autumn for its colors.
I often go for walks in the local park.
Listening to music helps me relax after work.
Traveling to new places broadens my perspective.
Spending time with family is very important to me.
I find that exercising regularly boosts my mood greatly.
Volunteering in the community gives me a sense of purpose.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: How often do you exercise each week?
Q2: What challenges do you face in maintaining a regular workout routine?
Q3: In your opinion, why is exercise important for overall health?
Q4: What advice would you give someone starting an exercise program?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about eco-friendly living.
questions: Q1: What eco-friendly practices do you follow in your daily life?
Q2: What obstacles have you encountered when trying to be more sustainable?
Q3: How do you feel about the current state of environmental awareness?
Q4: What tips can you offer to others wanting to live more sustainably?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about language learning.
questions: Q1: What languages have you studied, and why did you choose them?
Q2: What difficulties have you faced while learning a new language?
Q3: What do you think is the most effective way to learn a language?
Q4: What recommendations do you have for someone starting to learn a new language?
